title: Mindful American Chicken Skillet
description: A yeasty, snappy, and adventurous American dish featuring panang-paste, whisk, and macrobiotic-friendly ingredients, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This skillet combines the flavors of Thailand and America in a single pan.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper and cook until they start to soften.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the panang paste to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the yeast, salt, and black pepper.
Continue to simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
